briefs.title: Ukrainian Emergency Travel Students Exempt from International Health Fee in BC
briefs.summary: BC has remitted the international student health fee for students in BC on study permits with a Canada-Ukraine Authorization for Emergency Travel notation, retroactive to March 1, 2022.
briefs.action_required: Identify any Ukrainian emergency travel students and ensure their health fees paid since March 1, 2022 are refunded or waived.
